title: basej-lineage pipeline parameters
description: Single-cell somatic lineage analysis pipeline (annotated VCF → phylogeny → heatmaps).

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Per-sample annotated VCFs (for genotype tables) and output location.

input_csv.description: Path to comma-separated file containing per-sample VCF paths.
input_csv.help_text: Header row: biosampleName,vcf[,vcf_index]. The vcf is the somatic annotated VCF from basej-somatic (vcf_somatic output). vcf_index is optional; when omitted the .tbi is derived as <vcf>.tbi. Extra columns (e.g. group) are ignored. VCFs are used only for per-sample genotype tables, not to rebuild matrices.

workspace.description: Workspace identifier for S3 output layout and tagging.
workspace.help_text: Used in S3 output prefixes and applied as an S3 object tag. Required for standardized output organization.

project.description: Project identifier for S3 tagging and organization.
project.help_text: Applied as an S3 object tag to associate outputs with a specific project.

resume_workflow_id.description: Original workflow_id to reuse when resuming a run, keeping output paths stable and idempotent.
resume_workflow_id.help_text: Set this to the workflow_id of a previous run when resuming so outputs are written to the same S3 location and duplication is avoided. When unset, workflow_id is derived from TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID.

workflow_id.description: Workflow run identifier. Auto-populated from TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID or Nextflow session ID.
workflow_id.help_text: Unique identifier for this workflow run. Used in S3 output paths and tags. Defaults to TOWER_WORKFLOW_ID environment variable if running on Seqera Platform, otherwise uses the Nextflow session ID.

outputDir.description: S3 path where the results will be saved.
outputDir.help_text: The S3 output directory for pipeline results (e.g., 's3://your-output-bucket/analysis/project_name/pipeline-basej-lineage').

vcf_dir.help_text: Used instead of input_csv. Expects *_somatic_annotated{,_filtered}.vcf.gz with matching .tbi. VCFs feed the per-sample genotype tables consumed by POSTPROCESS.

timestamp.help_text: Optional timestamp for naming execution reports. Format: 'yyMMdd_HHmmss'.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Reference genome selection for species/assembly labels.

genome.help_text: Used for labelling outputs and optional SigProfiler genome build. Supported: GRCh38, GRCm39.

matrix_inputs.title: Matrix inputs (from basej-somatic)
matrix_inputs.description: Pre-built matrices produced by basej-somatic. NR/NV drive phylogeny + placement; the binary matrix drives mutational signatures. Provide these directly OR supply --lineage_csv to resolve them from the basej-somatic manifest.

lineage_csv.help_text: When provided, the pipeline parses this CSV (header: group,param,path) and resolves nr_matrix, nv_matrix, binary_matrix, mandatory_variants_qc_status, and input_csv from its rows. Single-group assumed (first group used). Individual params override manifest values when both are set.

nr_matrix.help_text: basej-somatic downstream_inputs output: <group>_NR_...PlusMandatoryNonEmpty.tsv. Rows = CHROM_POS_REF_ALT, columns = samples. Used as the single 'unfiltered' scheme for SEQUOIA phylogeny + variant placement. Use the PlusMandatoryNonEmpty scheme (not ForPhylogeny): the ForPhylogeny matrix is placed in full by the phylogeny step, which starves variant placement and skips the VAF/digital heatmaps.

nv_matrix.description: Pre-built NV (variant read) matrix TSV, paired with nr_matrix (REQUIRED).
nv_matrix.help_text: basej-somatic downstream_inputs output: <group>_NV_...PlusMandatoryNonEmpty.tsv (must pair with the same-scheme nr_matrix).

binary_matrix.description: Pre-binarized 0/1 variant x sample matrix for the mutational-signature branch.
binary_matrix.help_text: basej-somatic downstream_inputs output: <group>_binary_matrix_...PlusMandatoryNonEmpty.tsv. When unset, the mutational-signature branch is skipped.

genotype_bin.description: Optional pre-built binarized genotype matrix (0/0.5/1) — 'Option D'.
genotype_bin.help_text: When provided, SEQUOIA_PHYLOGENY skips VAF discretization and uses these genotype calls. Not produced by the standard basej-somatic run; leave unset to discretize VAF from NR/NV.

mandatory_variants_qc_status.description: Optional mandatory-variant QC status table from basej-somatic.
mandatory_variants_qc_status.help_text: basej-somatic mandatory_qc_status output: mandatory_variants_qc_status_<group>.tsv. When set, mandatory variants that FAIL QC (PassesBoth != Yes) are removed from the POSTPROCESS heatmaps. Unset => show all placed variants.

cohort_id.description: Cohort identifier used to label cohort-level outputs.
cohort_id.help_text: Groups the samples for phylogeny + signatures. Matches the basej-somatic group (e.g. 'Patient').

sequoia_phylogeny_options.title: SEQUOIA phylogeny options
sequoia_phylogeny_options.description: Phylogeny tree building + variant placement parameters.

sequoia_phylogeny_mode.description: Variant types to build phylogenies for.
sequoia_phylogeny_mode.help_text: Comma-separated subset of snv, indel, both — or 'all' to run all three.

sequoia_mpboot_bootstrap.help_text: MPBoot hard-requires >= 1000 replicates; lower values silently fail to produce a tree.

sequoia_vaf_absent.description: VAF below which a genotype is called absent.

sequoia_vaf_present.description: VAF at/above which a genotype is called present.

sequoia_keep_ancestral.description: Keep ancestral nodes in the tree.

sequoia_min_pval_for_true_somatic.description: Minimum p-value for a true somatic call.

sequoia_min_variant_reads_shared.description: Minimum variant reads for a shared variant.

sequoia_min_vaf_shared.description: Minimum VAF for a shared variant.

sequoia_mpboot_path.description: Path to the MPBoot binary inside the container.

postprocess_heatmap_y_axis_text_size.description: ggplot y-axis text size for the postprocess heatmaps.

plot_tips.description: Add a facet for variants placed on tip nodes.

sigdyn_enabled.description: Run SigDyn strict best-subset fitting + dynamics.

musicatk_enabled.description: Run musicatk de novo NMF/LDA (requires R >= 4.4.0).

musicatk_k_denovo.description: Number of de novo signatures for musicatk.
